channel.title: 1 John on Christian Internet Resources
channel.description: Recent content in 1 John on Christian Internet Resources

item.title: 1 John 1
item.description:
1 John Chapter 1

            1:1What was from (the) beginning, what we-have-heard, what we-have-seen with-the eyes of-us, what we-have-observed and the hands of-us have-handled about the word of-[the] life—2 and the life was-manifested, and we-have-seen and we-testify and proclaim to-you [the] eternal [the] life that was with the Father and was-manifested to us— 3 what we-have-seen and have-heard, we-proclaim also to-you in-order-that you also may-have fellowship with us, and [the] our [the] fellowship (is) also with the Father and with the Son of-him Jesus Christ.  4 And we write these-things in-order-that the joy of-us may-be fullpf.

item.title: 1 John 2
item.description:
1 John Chapter 2

            2:1My little-children, I-am-writing these-things to-you in-order-that you-may┘not└keep-sinning.  And if anybody does-sin, we-have (an) Advocate with the Father, Jesus Christ the just.  2 And he┘himself└is (the) propitiation for the sins of-us, and not only for [the] our (sins), but also for the whole world.  3 And in this we-know that we-have-known him:  if we-are-keeping the commandments of-him.  4 The-one saying [that], “I-have-known him,” and is┘not└keeping the commandments of-him, is (a) liar, and in this-one the truth is not.  5 And whoever2 keeps the word of-him—truly in this-one the love of-[the] God has-been-completed/perfected.  By this we-know that we-are in him.  6 The-one saying to-reside in him—he himself ought to-walk thus, even-as that-One walked.

item.title: 1 John 3
item.description:
1 John Chapter 3

3:1You-know what-kind-of love the Father has-given to-us in-order-that we-may-be-called children of-God, and we-are.  On-account-of this, the world does┘not└know us because it-did┘not└know him.  2 Beloved, now we-are children of-God, and not-yet did-it-appear what we-will-be.  We-know that if he-appears, we-will-be like him, because we-will-see him even-as he-is.  3 And every the-one having [the] this truth on him purifies himself even-as that-One is pure.

item.title: 1 John 4
item.description:
1 John Chapter 4

            4:1Beloved, do┘not└believe every spirit, but test the spirits if/whether they-are from [the] God, because many false-prophets have-gone-out into the world.  2 By this you-know the Spirit of-[the] God:  every spirit that confesses Jesus Christ has-come in (the) flesh is from [the] God.  3 And every spirit that does┘not└confess [the] Jesus is not of/from [the] God.  And this is the (spirit) of-the antichrist that you-have-heard that he-is-coming, and now is already in the world.  4 You are of/from [the] God, little-children; and you-have-overcome them, because greater is the-One in you than the-One in the world.  5 They are of/from the world; because-of this they-speak of/from the world, and the world listens-to them.  6 We are of/from [the] God.  The-one knowing [the] God listens-to us.  Who is not of/from [the] God, does┘not└listen-to us.  By this we-know the Spirit of-[the] truth and the spirit of-[the deception.

item.title: 1 John 5
item.description:
1 John Chapter 5

            5:1Every the-one believing that Jesus is the Christ has-been-begotten by [the] God, and every the-one loving the-One having-begotten loves also the-One having-been-begotten by him.  2 By this we-know that we-love the children of-[the] God:  when we-love [the] God and do the commandments of-him.  3 For this is the love of-[the] God:  [in-order]-that we-keep the commandments of-him, and the commandments of-him are not heavy/hard.  4 Because every the-one having-been-begotten by [the] God overcomes the world, and this is the victory [the] having-overcome the world:  the faith of-us.  5And who is the-one overcoming the world unless2 the-one believing that Jesus is the Son of-[the] God.
